examples: The volcaniclastic rocks can be seen as fused lumps, fused breccias and fused tuffs.
The volcanic rocks of the Lower Es3 in Oulituozi region are mainly volcaniclastic rock, basalt and trachyte.
The polymictic breccia in the Qianshan lead-zinc ore district of Anxi County is a suit of volcaniclastic rock, sedimentary pyroclastic rock and pyroclastic sedimentary rock.
